description: Style NoteSoul by hugo boss gives off a woody impression with a balsamic temperament. This is for a romantic occasion, with its dark, mystical and subtle aromas.Product DetailsIn this fragrance, there is a freshness in the aromatic water of citrus, lavender, spices, pepper and anise. The note of pepper is prominent as well.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
